headline: Super Micro Is Up 10% Today: Is It Outperforming Other AI Server Stocks Like Dell?
summary: Shares of Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) are up 10% in on Thursday, June 18, trading at $30 and change. headline: Apple Joins Tech’s Price Hike Party. Why it Stands Out from the Rest.
summary: While  Apple  is joining a growing list of tech companies raising prices for consumers this year, the iPhone maker’s decision stands out.  CEO Tim Cook said in an interview with The Wall Street Journal on Wednesday that  Apple  plans to increase prices to offset rising memory and storage costs.  Component costs have been soaring as demand far outpaces supply, thanks to the growing need for hardware that helps power artificial intelligence.

headline: Dell (DELL) Powers Cambridge AI Supercomputers For Climate, Healthcare And Fusion Research
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) is supplying key infrastructure for the University of Cambridge’s new Zenith and Sunrise AI supercomputers. The partnership with Cambridge and AMD focuses on national-scale AI systems for scientific and research use. The platforms are intended to support projects in climate modeling, healthcare research, fusion energy, and materials science. Dell Technologies is best known for its PCs, servers, and enterprise storage, and the Cambridge projects spotlight a...
